mainEntity.name: What if third-party fault in Draper work injury—can I sue besides comp?
mainEntity.text: What if third-party fault in Draper work injury—can I sue besides comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, pursue personal injury lawsuit against negligent third parties (not employer) alongside workers comp; offset benefits via subrogation[2][6].

suggestedAnswer.text: Draper cases allow comp for employer + PI suit for contractors/equipment makers. No double recovery—insurer reimbursed first. Higher PI limits apply. Coordinate claims carefully[2][6][7].

name: Third-Party Suits Draper Work Injuries
description: Yes, pursue personal injury lawsuit against negligent third parties (not employer) alongside workers comp; offset benefits via subrogation[2][6].
